## Entities.Confections.AnyProducedConfectionEntity type

Discriminated union of produced confection types. Discriminated on the `confectionType` field.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyProducedConfectionEntity = IProducedMoldedBonBonEntity | IProducedBarTruffleEntity | IProducedRolledTruffleEntity;
```
